\tzpentry{ID4478}{Gravity Emergence Emerge Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4478 introduces Gravity Emergence Emerge Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:gravity-emergence} \mathcal{G}_{\mathrm{emerge}} \;:=\; \lim_{t \to \infty} \big\langle \mathrm{StandingWaveInterference}(\omega_{\mathrm{Planck}}) \big\rangle_{\mathrm{time}} \;\;\xrightarrow{\;\mathrm{IR}\;}\;\; F_{\mathrm{Newton}}\,. \end{equation}
